message:
fix(bubbletea): improve quit handling and thread handle naming

Thread handle improvements:
- Remove underscore prefix from handle variables (now used, not just captured)
- External forwarder and input parser handles tracked for clean shutdown

Quit handling:
- Add should_quit flag to break out of message processing loop cleanly
- Check for quit after processing pending messages, not mid-loop
- Enables proper cleanup before returning model

Refs: bd-3dmx, bd-3azk

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
